prompt: A conceptual papercraft diorama of a classroom viewed from a strict top-down perspective. Ten student desks are arranged in a grid. Seven desks are clean, neatly arranged with books and papers aligned. Three desks are equally and clearly distorted, with surfaces warped and papers flowing outward like collapsing structures. The floor beneath these desks appears to crack and sink. The scene uses layered paper textures with visible cut edges and imperfections, giving a handcrafted feel. No people, no text, no labels.
insight: Nearly 3 in 10 high school students reported poor mental health, and this has not improved in recent years.
